alt: Macro photograph of a printed circuit board lit from behind, with green conductive pathways glowing against deep black negative space.
Tight close-up of a dark code editor screen running a JavaScript file, syntax highlighted in the Dracula colour palette.
Over-the-shoulder view of two engineers reviewing code together on a laptop in a quiet workspace.
Black and white macro of a laptop screen rendering a tightly gridded time-series chart — pure data, no chrome.
First-person shot of a smartphone held in hand showing a dark-mode iOS interface against a softly blurred desk.
Modern minimalist interior with restrained wooden benches and soft daylight — calm, considered, unhurried.
Close-up of an SVG source file in a dark code editor, syntax highlighted in blue and magenta.
A considered home-office workspace — leather chair, low-profile mechanical keyboard, soft daylight through closed blinds.
An engineer with a tablet in a server-room corridor, blue rack lights reflecting on the glass partition behind her.
A whiteboard covered in orange and blue sticky notes arranged into kanban columns — workflow-as-zine.
A network rack viewed head-on — patch panels, neatly bundled fibre, indicator LEDs glowing amber and green in the dark.
